A Year In Clay

throwing, glazing, growing

01 / 05
Kiln & Co.
by Nora

The Studio By The Numbers

320+ pots thrown, 85+ glazes tested, 14 markets attended, and 3 custom collabs. These numbers aren’t just totals — they’re proof I kept showing up at the wheel, even on the days it all collapsed.

so much clay
02 / 05
Kiln & Co.
by Nora

My Biggest Moment

This year I opened the storefront on Elm Street and fired my first wood-kiln batch. I used to only picture this. Now it’s the door I unlock every morning — proof that small, steady throws add up.

we did it
03 / 05
Kiln & Co.
by Nora

The Project I Loved Most

Client: Willow & Co. Weddings. Project: custom registry dinnerware. This commission reminded me why I throw pots in the first place — to make something a family will pass down for years.

for them
